AN IRRESISTIBLE OPPORTUNITY TO INDULGE IN BETTING

If you have the slightest experience about betting sites that are popular in India, you have heard of 1xBet. If you are looking for joining the gambling scene, you are required to have more information about the site. We are about to cover all the essentials about each 1xBet bonus, which will help newbies to understand more about the site’s ongoing promotions and then join carefully. We will mostly reflect on the bonuses you can avail upon joining and playing on 1xBet. Let’s understand the basics of 1xBet first:

1xBet is determined and equipped to deliver a world-class gaming experience to their Indian betting enthusiasts. Having acquired superior ratings in all the betting criteria, the site assuredly offers you an irresistible opportunity that allows you to indulge in a rhythmic spell of betting. With a unique assortment of betting variety, an enjoyable mobile experience, commendable support, and entertaining betting experience, they have enthusiastically resolved to be the best international betting site that provides you with world-class gaming experience.

Pros:

1xBet is known for their wide assortment of betting variety. Right from sports like cricket to cockfighting, they have it all. The website also houses an exclusive online casino that runs exciting promotions all through the year. In case you are stuck and are in need of some assistance, their round the clock live chat support is always available to aid you. 1xBet also has a mobile app that you can use when you are on the go. The site has ensured that the app is compatible with Android, iOS, and Windows devices. As a premier betting site, 1xBet is extra cautious about security issues, and thus,they make sure that all over activities are governed with integrity and transparency.

Cons:

1xBet strives every day to transform their cons into pros. Hence, none.

The plethora of bonuses, which include (but not limited to) loyalty bonus, free spin bonus, reload bonus, and live casino bonus, are designed to suffice everyone’s palate and are offered throughout the year. Furthermore, the numerous offers and promotions are followed by quick withdrawals. Here is a listof current bonuses that the site offers:

Deposit Bonus:

1xBetbids you a warm welcome by offering you a 100% bonus of up to 8000 INR on your very first deposit with them. That’s not it! In addition to the 100% bonus on deposit, their Casino and 1x Games also gives you 150 free spins. Deposits can be made through numerous payment options that are available on the site. 1xBetalso offers welcome deposits made via cryptocurrency, such as Bitcoin. 1xBet provides numerous promotions and bonuses in appreciation for choosing the site for your entertainment.

Mobile Bonus:

The owners of 1xBet have designed a user-friendly mobile app to cater to their users who are always on the go. Now there is no need to miss out on a premier betting experience as the mobile app caters to your gaming need irrespective of the mobile device you use. The app is compatible with all popular mobile operating system viz., Android, iOS, and Windows devices, allowing users to wager and win irrespective of the smartphones they use. Mobile app users are also given bonuses that are similar to website users.

Live Casino Bonus:

For users who especially enjoy live casino games, 1xBetoffers a numerous range of bonuses to keep you gripped to the listed live games. Gaming enthusiasts can earn themselves cashback up to 5% by playing the listed games. Some of the games carry an added percentage, and hence playing these games will give you the adrenalin rush that you crave. Roulette (16% cashback) and Poker (16% cashback) two popular games that can fetch you a higher amount of cashback.

Loyalty Bonus:

Gratitude and appreciation are at the backdrop of all their offerings. 1xBet believes in giving their users ample opportunities to gain bonus points in various sections of the site. These points can later be exchanged for promo codes and game tokens. Additionally, 1xBetofferstheir unique offering – the Super Lotto Bonus, wherein users receive lottery tickets for top-ups that exceed a stipulated amount. The 10th deposit bonus rewards users who have made their tenth deposit. This offer includes the receipt of 100 free spins and a 50% 10th deposit bonus for slots.

Cashback:

As you spend on various betting options, 1xBet totals the sum of the amount spent by you to give you a weekly cashback. Also, the VIP cashback is one of the site’s most popular offers. In this offer, the user gains experience points when they wager. After collecting a preset number of points, the user is allowed to move up in an 8-level cashback hierarchy. The highest level is the VIP status level, wherein the user is given a set percentage of cashback on all bets.

Free spins:

As part of the casino and 1xGames promotions, 1xBetoffers a welcome package of up to €1500 in addition to 150 free spins. To cheer a user who is experiencing a losing streak, the site offers the user a free spin, which can be claimed on a loss of INR 544 in the Formula 1 game. Additionally, 1xBetalso has a Game of the Day offer that allows you to win free spins on all days of the week. This offer allows you to win a minimum of 25 free spins, the maximum being 50. Viking Gods, Poisoned apple, and Wild Warriors are among these games.

Reload Bonus:

As a solution for the mid-week itch, 1xBetgives you a chance to claim a reload bonus as a part of their Wednesday promotions. This bonus is offered to users who have made deposits in the past. The Wednesday promotion is limited only for a fixed period. Also, the offer is open only for the users who have participated in the Lucky Friday offer. The Lucky Friday bonus is offered at a fixed time window on Fridays, and the deposits that are made within that time interval are eligible for the Wednesday bonus offer. Place your bets and take advantage of the mid-week offer.

200% Winnings Bonus:

If you are riveted to double your winnings, you should try 1xBet’s 200% winning bonus. To take part in Win 200%, you first have to bet and win in 1xGames. If you are one among the 10000 bets selected, your winning will be multiplied by odds of x2. These bets are selected randomly every day. Try your hand at this offer and give yourself a chance to win the 200% winnings bonus.

No Deposit Bonus:

From time to time, 1xBetsurprisestheir loyal users with no deposit bonus.  No deposit bonus is a free bonus that is given to regular users. With this bonus, users can wager and win real money games. The user is allowed to play for this bonus only if he qualifies as per the site’s terms and conditions. Keep a watchful eye on the website to take advantage of the same.

Accumulator of the Day Bonus:

1xBetoffers this bonus on sports events. The site has a surplus of such events that reaches over 1000 when listed. They select events that exhibit an increased trend of making profit and pool them with Accumulators in Sports and Casino Live categories. Upon winning, the Accumulator of the Day gains a 10% increase in the odds.

TVBET Jackpot Bonus

1xBet does not slack in giving you opportunities to win bonuses. So, here is another one. This offer is available only for a limited period of time in which users are allowed to win only one jackpot daily. Hence, place bets on TVBET section of TV games, and you could be a proud winner of a jackpot. 1% of the overall value of the real money bets constitutes the jackpot amount. This bonus is offered exclusively to the registered users.

GOOD LUCK!
